summary: Complete frontend testing of offer detail page updates for FINAL FIX: Source Link + Full Edit Mode + Clean Offer Detail. All 11 features verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Line 514: editMode state properly defaults to false for VIEW mode
Line 515: isEditing computed as isNew || (canEdit && editMode) - correct logic
Lines 562-576: Edit/Cancel/Save button visibility properly conditional on editMode state
Line 654: source-link button navigates to project page using navigate(`/projects/${offer.project_id}`)
Line 659: 'Отвори в обекта →' helper text visible in source section
Lines 782-791: Column headers match expected: СМР, ТИП, ЛОКАЦИЯ (extra only), МЯРКА, К-ВО, МАТ/ЕД, ТРУД/ЕД, МАТЕРИАЛ, ТРУД, ОБЩО
ActivityBudgetsPanel import exists but is NOT rendered anywhere on offer detail page - correctly removed
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing offers OFF-0103 (extra, Sent) and OFF-0104 (main, Draft)
context_for_next_testing_agent: View/Edit mode toggle fully working. Key testids: edit-btn (VIEW->EDIT), save-btn, cancel-edit-btn (EDIT->VIEW), source-link (navigates to project). Extra offer OFF-0103 has 3 lines with Location column. Main offer OFF-0104 has sidebar with totals. All features working as expected.

Extra offer opens in VIEW mode by defaul.notes: title-input has disabled attribute, all form fields non-editable in VIEW mode

'Редактиране' button visible in VIEW mod.notes: edit-btn with text 'Редактиране' visible in header for both extra and main offers

Clicking 'Редактиране' enters EDIT mode.notes: After clicking edit-btn, title-input becomes enabled, add-line-btn and ai-assist-btn appear

EDIT mode shows 'Запази' and 'Отказ' but.notes: save-btn with 'Запази' and cancel-edit-btn with 'Отказ' visible in EDIT mode

'Отказ' exits edit mode and restores dat.notes: Clicking cancel-edit-btn returns to VIEW mode - edit-btn reappears, fields disabled again

'Източник' section is clickable and navi.notes: source-link clicked, URL changed from /offers/... to /projects/5900f318-8515-48a3-b22d-fbe56bf22ab5

'Отвори в обекта →' helper text visible.notes: Text found in source-link inner text: 'Източник: Допълнителни СМР ... Отвори в обекта →'

All monetary values fully visible (no cl.notes: Screenshot shows full values: BGN 74.38, BGN 117.00, BGN 234.00 fully visible with proper column widths

'Бюджети по тип дейност' block NOT prese.notes: Page text search for 'Бюджети по тип дейност' returned no matches

Main offer (Draft) still has functional.notes: OFF-0104 Draft: edit-btn visible, clicking enters edit mode with save/cancel/send buttons, add-line-btn and ai-assist-btn present

Column headers: СМР, ТИП, ЛОКАЦИЯ, МЯРКА.notes: Extra offer headers include ЛОКАЦИЯ. Main offer headers exclude ЛОКАЦИЯ (correct conditional behavior)
